description: DOCUMENT draft requires exclusive write access (mutex lock)
Reference DATABASE requires exclusive update access (mutex lock)
FACT_CHECKER can work on sections as they are submitted (does not wait for all)
EDITOR can only finalize a section after it has passed fact checking by FACT_CHECKER
Section submission channel from RESEARCHER_A, RESEARCHER_B, RESEARCHER_C to FACT_CHECKER / EDITOR
FACT_CHECKER decides whether claims are verified or need revision
EDITOR decides whether sections are consistent or require cross-section revisions
Research -> submit -> FACT_CHECKER fact check -> EDITOR review -> finalize (sequential pipeline per section)
If FACT_CHECKER flags a claim, researcher must revise and resubmit for re-verification
All three researchers (RESEARCHER_A, RESEARCHER_B, RESEARCHER_C), FACT_CHECKER, and EDITOR may need DOCUMENT draft lock
Hold-and-wait: researcher holds DOCUMENT lock while waiting for fact-check feedback from FACT_CHECKER, blocking other researchers from writing
